confidenceReason: The merge pipeline configuration was inspected directly.
evidenceSummary: Lint gates merges; the contract tests and invariant suite run on merge but are advisory.

basis.statement: Pipeline configuration and the two failing-but-merged runs were inspected.

findings.condition: The merge pipeline marks both sensor jobs as non-required; two merged changes in the sampled month had a failing contract-test run.

criteria.criterion: Contract tests, the invariant suite, and lint block nonconforming merges or route them through reviewable exceptions.
criteria.rationale: An advisory sensor protects nothing when the pressure is on; the gate is what makes the standard hold regardless of who is merging.

effect.statement: Contract conformance depends on reviewer diligence rather than the gate, constraining enforcement to minimum.

evidence.statement: The pipeline config lists lint as required and the contract-test and invariant jobs as informational; merge history shows two failing contract-test runs that merged.

findings.statement: Contract tests and the invariant suite run at merge time but cannot block a merge.

summary: Lint gates merges; the contract tests and invariant suite run on merge but are advisory.
